harness_lockdown.title: Verification gate (scripts/verify.sh)
harness_lockdown.notes: Gate created, exits 0. Checks: secrets scan, hardcoded IDs, per-client shape, router lint.

harness_lockdown.title: State artifacts (PROGRESS.md + DECISIONS.md)
harness_lockdown.notes: PROGRESS.md: where we are + next steps. DECISIONS.md: why each choice was made (append-only).

harness_lockdown.title: Scope primitive (feature_list.json)
harness_lockdown.notes: This file. Enforces sequencing + WIP=1. Data, not prose. Prevents agent from skipping steps.

harness_lockdown.title: Harness rule canon (HARNESS.md)
harness_lockdown.notes: The standard this repo is measured against. Domain-free rules (R01–R15+). Crosswalks to REPO_BLUEPRINT.md.

harness_lockdown.title: Hook wiring (.githooks/pre-commit)
harness_lockdown.notes: Makes the gate binding. Pre-commit runs verify.sh; non-zero exit refuses commit. Not bypassable.

harness_lockdown.title: Init script (scripts/init.sh)
harness_lockdown.notes: One-shot environment setup: .env from template, deps, GHL MCP reachable, PIT valid. Runs before feature work.

harness_lockdown.title: Audit checklist (all green)
harness_lockdown.notes: All 10 audit boxes pass. Harness is locked. Ready for feature work or loops.

router_restructure.title: CLAUDE.md rewritten as thin router
router_restructure.verify: bash scripts/verify.sh && grep -q 'MEMORY.md' CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'AGENTS.md' CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'CONTEXT.md' CLAUDE.md
router_restructure.notes: First 3 lines: Read MEMORY, AGENTS, CONTEXT. Then repo tree. ≤100 lines, domain-free.

router_restructure.title: MEMORY.md created (session log + who Zach is)
router_restructure.verify: test -f MEMORY.md && grep -q 'Who Zach Is' MEMORY.md && grep -q 'Session Log' MEMORY.md
router_restructure.notes: Append-only: session log (newest on top) + 'who Zach is' (user profile). Enables cross-session continuity.

router_restructure.title: CONTEXT.md created (renamed PROGRESS.md, rewritten with truth)
router_restructure.notes: Current stage, next steps, last checkpoint. Rewritten each session (not append-only). Deletes PROGRESS.md.

router_restructure.title: AGENTS.md created (hard rules canon, folded from HARNESS.md)
router_restructure.verify: test -f AGENTS.md && grep -q 'R01.*Source of Truth' AGENTS.md
router_restructure.notes: Folded HARNESS.md rules (R01–R15) + agent responsibilities. HARNESS.md deleted after.

router_restructure.title: scripts/update-state.sh created (save-and-update helper)
router_restructure.notes: Appends timestamped session-entry stub to MEMORY.md. Called before commit to enable save-and-update routine.

router_restructure.title: scripts/verify.sh fixed (clients/ check conditional)
router_restructure.notes: clients/ check now skips if absent (fresh clone). Updated artifact checks: MEMORY/AGENTS/CONTEXT instead of HARNESS/PROGRESS. Added router ref check.

router_restructure.title: feature_list.json updated (restructure as done items)
router_restructure.notes: Added router_restructure section (R01–R07, all done). Verified: exit 0 both ways (clients/ present and absent).

feature_work.notes: Blocks all SMS-dependent features (F02, F03, F04). Status: awaiting carrier approval. See clients/adkins-music-lessons/notes.md.

feature_work.title: Onboard second client

ops_automation.title: Cross-client bulk reporting loop
ops_automation.notes: NOT A LOOP YET. Blocked by harness green + ≥2 active clients. Will become a loop (daily, capped) once feature work is done. See LOOPS.md (TBD).

notes: WIP=1: only one item in-flight at a time. dependsOn enforces sequencing. Verify command per item. Feature work starts AFTER harness audit (H07) is green.
